sp_widget.css: /* No CSS here. Add via Tasker Theme */
sp_widget.description:
Create a new widget for reopen tasks modal popup, based off of widget Tasker Modal - Delete Task
2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Create a new widget 2.7.0 | 2021-10-7 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Updated to meet new requirements for Messages 2.7.0 | 2021-10-7 | mmcc | STRY0111802 - Reopen - Radio Button selected by Default Radio button with id="taskOnly" set as default, Submit button always enabled 2.7.0 | 2021-10-8 | mmcc | STRY0109110 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal- Add Descendant tasks count var taskId changed to taskSysId
sp_widget.name: Tasker Modal - Reopen Tasks
sp_widget.template: {{data.msgBody1}}
